# Pretending: missing intermediate doesn't trigger rebuild if target is newer
# prog.o doesn't exist but prog is newer than prog.c, so no rebuild needed.
cp prog prog
cp prog.c prog.c
mk -n -p 1 -f mkfile
# Nothing should be rebuilt (no output in dry-run)
! stdout .

-- mkfile --
prog: prog.o
	link prog.o
prog.o: prog.c
	cc prog.c
-- prog --
binary
-- prog.c --
source
